title: It Never Looks Like Summer
content:
"It never looks like summer here
     On Beeny by the sea."
    But though she saw its look as drear,
     Summer it seemed to me.

    It never looks like summer now
     Whatever weather's there;
    But ah, it cannot anyhow,
     On Beeny or elsewhere!

    BOSCASTLE,
    March 8, 1913.
meaning:
"It Never Looks Like Summer" is a quintessential example of Thomas Hardy's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
